description: India Book II, 37: Poem by Avraham Ibn Yiju praising Madmun b. Ḥasan as a defender of the faith (and as a defender of Avraham Ibn Yiju himself). Aden, ca. 1141.
tags: literary with documentary value, poem, IB2, ib-untranslated-eng, India
description_he: ספר הודו II,37: שיר מאברהם אבן יג'ו בשבח מדמון בן חסן כמגן האמונה, עדן, כ-1141
